ledger.question: Will an interim US-Iran/Hormuz de-escalation framework remain intact for 30 days?
ledger.resolution_criteria: Resolved yes if no confirmed breakdown of the framework and no sustained Hormuz closure occurs by horizon end; otherwise no.

ledger.question: Will there be a significant Hormuz shipping disruption within 30 days?
ledger.resolution_criteria: Resolved yes if tanker/commercial traffic through Hormuz is materially disrupted for at least 48 hours by military, mining, blockade, or insurance-denial conditions.

ledger.question: Will Brent crude trade above USD 110 for five consecutive trading days within 30 days?
ledger.resolution_criteria: Resolved using a recognized Brent benchmark source. Intraday spikes alone do not count unless the close remains above USD 110 for five consecutive trading days.

ledger.question: Will Sri Lanka face measurable port or fuel-import stress attributable to Hormuz/Middle East disruption within 30 days?
ledger.resolution_criteria: Resolved yes if official/publicly verifiable SLPA, CPC, CBSL, shipping-line, or credible market data show schedule disruption, procurement delay, freight/insurance shock, or fuel-stock stress linked to the crisis.

ledger.resolution_criteria: Resolved yes if official/publicly verifiable SLPA, CPC, CBSL, shipping-line, or credible market data show schedule disruption, procurement delay, freight/insurance shock, or fuel-stock stress linked to the crisis.

ledger.question: Will an interim US-Iran/Hormuz de-escalation framework remain intact for 30 days?
ledger.resolution_criteria: Resolved yes if no confirmed breakdown of the framework and no sustained Hormuz closure occurs by horizon end; otherwise no.

ledger.question: Will there be a significant Hormuz shipping disruption within 30 days?
ledger.resolution_criteria: Resolved yes if tanker/commercial traffic through Hormuz is materially disrupted for at least 48 hours by military, mining, blockade, or insurance-denial conditions.
